2282360.name: Chicken Coop
2282360.description:
Chicken Coop


The humans have disappeared, leaving the homestead in chaos. The cow desperately needs her pumpkin, and it's up to you and your trusty team of farm animals to save the day! Welcome to Chicken Coop, a charming and engaging game that's perfect for young audiences.

In this world, you'll take charge of your own magical farm, managing your flock of quirky chickens and using the tools available to build new structures, create tools and equipment, and plant crops that will keep your animals healthy and productive. As you explore the world around you, you'll encounter a range of other farm animals who can help you build a thriving homestead.

Paint and design your buildings to make them truly your own, and recruit the Golden Retriever to keep pesky foxes at bay. You'll also need the help of the Cat, who's always on the lookout for hungry birds trying to steal your crops.

With its engaging gameplay, cute characters, and endless possibilities for customization, Chicken Coop is a game that you won't want to put down. So gather your friends and start building your own magical farm today!
2282360.supported_languages:
英语*, 瑞典语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
